title: Horizon Chart を 縦方向に並べて 多系列時系列を比較する
novelty_reason: Horizon Chart の強みである 縦方向の小さな帯を複数並べる構成にし、系列ごとの増減パターンを一画面で比較しやすくします。
why_it_works: 各系列を同じ高さの帯に正規化し、正負を色分けした 3 バンドで重ねることで、行間比較と時系列の山谷把握を同時に行えます。
how_to_read: 左のラベルごとに 1 系列を表し、横軸は年です。
青系は正、赤系は負の変動で、色が濃いほど絶対値が大きいことを示します。
transform_js: const years = Array.isArray(rawData.years) ? rawData.years.map((v) => String(v)) : []; const sourceSeries = Array.isArray(rawData.series) ? rawData.series : []; const normalized = sourceSeries.map((item, rowIndex) => { const name = String(item && item.name != null ? item.name : String.fromCharCode(65 + rowIndex)); const values = Array.isArray(item && item.values) ? item.values : []; const rowValues = years.map((_, colIndex) => Number(values[colIndex] ?? 0)); return { name: name, values: rowValues }; }); const allValues = normalized.flatMap((row) => row.values); const maxAbs = allValues.reduce((acc, value) => Math.max(acc, Math.abs(Number(value) || 0)), 0); const bandCount = 3; const bandStep = maxAbs > 0 ? maxAbs / bandCount : 1; const layers = normalized.map((row) => { const positive = []; const negative = []; for (let band = 0; band < bandCount; band += 1) { positive.push(row.values.map((value) => { const remain = Math.abs(value) - band * bandStep; if (value <= 0 || remain <= 0) { return 0; } return Math.min(remain, bandStep); })); negative.push(row.values.map((value) => { const remain = Math.abs(value) - band * bandStep; if (value >= 0 || remain <= 0) { return 0; } return Math.min(remain, bandStep); })); } return { positive: positive, negative: negative }; }); transformedData = { years: years, seriesNames: normalized.map((row) => row.name), rawValues: normalized.map((row) => row.values), layers: layers, bandCount: bandCount, bandStep: bandStep };
echarts_js: const years = Array.isArray(transformedData.years) ? transformedData.years : []; const seriesNames = Array.isArray(transformedData.seriesNames) ? transformedData.seriesNames : []; const layers = Array.isArray(transformedData.layers) ? transformedData.layers : []; const bandCount = Number(transformedData.bandCount || 3); const bandStep = Math.max(Number(transformedData.bandStep || 1), 1e-6); const rowCount = Math.max(seriesNames.length, 1); const topPct = 6; const bottomPct = 10; const gapPct = 1.2; const usablePct = Math.max(20, 100 - topPct - bottomPct - gapPct * Math.max(rowCount - 1, 0)); const rowPct = usablePct / rowCount; const grids = []; const xAxes = []; const yAxes = []; const series = []; const graphics = []; const posPalette = ['#c7d2fe', '#818cf8', '#4f46e5']; const negPalette = ['#fecaca', '#fca5a5', '#ef4444']; for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < rowCount; rowIndex += 1) { const rowTop = topPct + rowIndex * (rowPct + gapPct); grids.push({ left: 58, right: 18, top: String(rowTop) + '%', height: String(rowPct) + '%' }); xAxes.push({ gridIndex: rowIndex, type: 'category', boundaryGap: false, data: years, axisLine: { show: rowIndex === rowCount - 1 }, axisTick: { show: rowIndex === rowCount - 1 }, axisLabel: { show: rowIndex === rowCount - 1, color: '#475569' }, splitLine: { show: false } }); yAxes.push({ gridIndex: rowIndex, type: 'value', min: 0, max: bandStep, axisLine: { show: false }, axisTick: { show: false }, axisLabel: { show: false }, splitLine: { show: false } }); const rowName = seriesNames[rowIndex] || String.fromCharCode(65 + rowIndex); graphics.push({ type: 'text', left: 20, top: String(rowTop + rowPct / 2) + '%', style: { text: rowName, fill: '#334155', font: '12px sans-serif', textAlign: 'center', textVerticalAlign: 'middle' }, z: 200 }); const layer = layers[rowIndex] || { positive: [], negative: [] }; for (let band = 0; band < bandCount; band += 1) { const positiveData = Array.isArray(layer.positive) && Array.isArray(layer.positive[band]) ? layer.positive[band] : years.map(() => 0); const negativeData = Array.isArray(layer.negative) && Array.isArray(layer.negative[band]) ? layer.negative[band] : years.map(() => 0); series.push({ name: rowName + ' pos ' + String(band + 1), type: 'line', xAxisIndex: rowIndex, yAxisIndex: rowIndex, data: positiveData, showSymbol: false, smooth: 0.3, lineStyle: { width: 0 }, areaStyle: { color: posPalette[Math.min(band, posPalette.length - 1)], opacity: 0.9 }, emphasis: { disabled: true }, z: 20 + band }); series.push({ name: rowName + ' neg ' + String(band + 1), type: 'line', xAxisIndex: rowIndex, yAxisIndex: rowIndex, data: negativeData, showSymbol: false, smooth: 0.3, lineStyle: { width: 0 }, areaStyle: { color: negPalette[Math.min(band, negPalette.length - 1)], opacity: 0.9 }, emphasis: { disabled: true }, z: 30 + band }); } } option = { animation: false, tooltip: { trigger: 'axis', axisPointer: { type: 'line' } }, grid: grids, xAxis: xAxes, yAxis: yAxes, series: series, graphic: graphics };
